ci._note: runtime + flake rate need CI log access (GH Actions API); planned as a proposal output

testing._note: coverage % + flake rate not measured in V0 (need test-run integration); planned as a proposal output

docs._note: public-API docstring coverage (interrogate / similar) not measured in V0; planned as a proposal output

security._note: regex sweep is a placeholder for gitleaks (high FP rate by design); proper scanners are a proposal output

dependencies._note: actual vulnerability count needs osv-scanner / Dependabot alerts; planned as a proposal output

gaps.detail: No .github/workflows/*.yml and no other CI config — there is no automated test/lint/security signal on PRs.
gaps.proposed_action: Adopt GitHub Actions; minimal first workflow runs the existing make test targets and a lint pass on PRs.

frameworks: NIST SSDF: PO.1 — define the security & compliance requirements
gaps.detail: Repo has no LICENSE/LICENSE.md/LICENSE.txt — legally ambiguous reuse posture.
gaps.proposed_action: Add an explicit LICENSE (Apache-2.0 / MIT / proprietary, per the project's intent).

gaps.detail: No vulnerability-disclosure policy — researchers have nowhere documented to report findings.
gaps.proposed_action: Add SECURITY.md naming a reporting channel and a response SLA.

gaps.detail: V0 audit's regex sweep is a placeholder; a real scanner (gitleaks/trufflehog) must run pre-commit and in CI.
gaps.proposed_action: Adopt gitleaks; add a pre-commit hook and a CI job. Tune .gitleaks.toml for this repo's patterns.

gaps.detail: No Dependabot or Renovate config — vulnerable transitive updates won't be flagged automatically.
gaps.proposed_action: Enable Dependabot (free for GitHub repos); grouping rules to avoid noise.

gaps.detail: V0 audit only counts test files; no coverage % is produced, so we can't see drift.
gaps.proposed_action: Add coverage.py to the pytest runs in CI; publish a per-PR summary; track median over time.

gaps.detail: Review-routing relies on humans remembering who to ask.
gaps.proposed_action: Add CODEOWNERS once CI is in place and required-reviews can enforce it.

gaps.detail: Without Scorecard there's no continuous, comparable security-posture score.
gaps.proposed_action: Add the official scorecard-action workflow once basic CI exists.
